scenario.context: Station 05 of the day run: steer project execution and handle changed boundary conditions.
scenario.mission: You prioritize tasks, control changes, and keep status as well as risks transparent for team and customer.

constraints: Control changes in a disciplined way

customerRequest.subject: Station 05: Project execution and control
customerRequest.body: Please steer project execution under change pressure and secure the status report with clear next steps.

questions.title: Control during implementation
questions.prompt: Which points are important for stable project execution? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Review status regularly with team and stakeholders
Assign deliverables to clearly responsible owners

feedback.correct: Correct: These are central levers for steering implementation.
feedback.wrong: Partly wrong: Please secure transparency, risk handling, and responsibility more clearly.

questions.title: Prioritize a change
questions.prompt: A new requirement conflicts with a critical milestone. What is the best next step?

options.text: Implement the change immediately and silently move the milestone
Assess the impact, align the options, and document the decision
Reject the change across the board without reviewing it
options.rationale: Can lead to the wrong professional decision.

feedback.correct: Correct: This keeps project execution controllable.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: Changes need evaluation and a documented decision.

questions.title: Build a status report
questions.prompt: Put the flow for a robust status report in order.
items: Capture the current state for each work package
Assess impact on the target date
Align and send the status report
correctOrder: Capture the current state for each work package
Assess impact on the target date
Align and send the status report

feedback.correct: Correct: The report is clearly structured and actionable.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please work out the situation first, then impact and action.

questions.title: Calculate milestone rate
questions.prompt: Out of 13 planned milestones, 10 were achieved on time. What is the on-time rate in percent (rounded)?

feedback.wrong: Please calculate the share of on-time milestones correctly.

questions.title: Formulate a status message
questions.prompt: Formulate a status message in 4-6 sentences with current state, risk, and next action.
questions.expectedOutline: Clear project status, prioritized risk, and concrete follow-up action.

feedback.correct: Correct: The message can be used for steering and alignment.
feedback.wrong: Please formulate the current state, risk, and next action more concretely.
